title: Pararistolochia momandul
taxonomy: Pararistolochia momandul is a species of plant in the Aristolochiaceae family. This family is commonly known as the birthwort family, consisting of about 480 species of flowering plants. The Aristolochiaceae family is divided into several genera, with Pararistolochia being one of them. The classification of Pararistolochia momandul places it within the order Piperales, which is a group of flowering plants that includes the pipevine and pepper family. Further classification places it within the class Magnoliopsida, which includes flowering plants with one or two cotyledons.
